SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils

パッケージ org.commonutils.id

package org.commonutils.id
Identifier generators with a shared IdGenerator contract.

Main entry points

  • IdGenerator — common generate() procedure
  • UuidV4IdGenerator — RFC 4122 version-4 UUIDs
  • UuidV7 — RFC 9562 version-7 UUIDs (Instant, Clock, batch and range helpers)
  • UuidV7IdGenerator — IdGenerator for RFC 9562 version-7 UUIDs (fixed Instant or per-call Clock)

Choosing UUID version

Version 4 (RFC 4122) embeds no timestamp: identifiers are random. Use UuidV4IdGenerator or UUID.randomUUID() when you need opaque, unpredictable IDs without time semantics.

Version 7 (RFC 9562) carries Unix milliseconds in the most significant bits for rough time order and sorting. Use UuidV7 or UuidV7IdGenerator when you need that encoding or test-friendly control via Clock; version 4 deliberately does not accept Clock or date-time parameters.

  • クラス
    説明
    IdGenerator<T>
    Generates identifiers of type T.
    UuidV4IdGenerator
    IdGenerator for RFC 4122 version-4 (random) UUIDs.
    UuidV7
    Static factory for RFC 9562 UUID version 7 (Unix millisecond timestamp in the most significant bits, random in the remainder).
    UuidV7IdGenerator
    IdGenerator for RFC 9562 UUID version 7.
